name: rough-skin
short_effect: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.
effect_text: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage.  This ability functions identically to iron barbs.
flavor_text: The Pokémon's rough skin damages attackers that make direct contact with it.
